message:
fix(core): resolve 3 failing lib tests

- error_clustering: add bounds check in cluster_info() to return None
  for out-of-range error_id instead of panicking on index
- replay: fix play_with_stop_control test that relied on spawned-task
  timing with tokio::time::pause() on single-threaded runtime — send
  stop signal before play to deterministically test control-check path
- pool: pool_evict_partial_only_stale was already fixed by another
  agent (adjusted timeouts to avoid put() pre-eviction race)

All 7771 lib tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
